use_when: The Lab must mine archives, notes or drafts for publishable insight.
The value is separating new resultant value from source echo.
do_not_use_when: The request is only content generation without source-grounded discovery.
Copyright, authorship or publication boundaries are unclear.

starter_observables.name: source_cluster
starter_observables.risk: Cluster similarity can be mistaken for novelty.

starter_observables.name: novelty_density
starter_observables.role: Ratio of new synthesis to source echo.
starter_observables.risk: Can reward eccentric wording over value.

starter_observables.name: audience_fit
starter_observables.role: Whether the insight can land for a target reader.

starter_observables.name: citation_gap
starter_observables.risk: Can become busywork if not tied to claim risk.

starter_baselines.name: source_echo_baseline
starter_baselines.role: Attacks recycled phrasing or received insight.

starter_baselines.name: generic_summary
starter_baselines.role: Attacks summaries that add no resultant value.

starter_falsifiers.blocks: Publishing a claim without evidence chain.

admin_boundaries.boundary: Publication requires human editorial approval and rights review.

e2e_checks.expectation: A completed cycle shows source echo, novelty and missing evidence before draft promotion.

adaptation_questions: Which archive or source set is in scope?
What counts as new value for this audience?
Which publication boundary must block promotion?
